plugins.name: solidsight
plugins.description: 3D design, CAD and 3D printing: parametric Python in, deterministic geometry, renders and a machine-readable validation report out.

plugins.name: animationsight
plugins.description: Animation clips and mocap (.bvh): foot sliding, pops, ground penetration, balance, loop seams — measured, with renders of the exact frames that are wrong.

plugins.name: texturesight
plugins.description: UVs and texture maps: texel density, stretch, seams, islands, packing, tiling, normal maps — measured, with evidence renders.

plugins.name: shadersight
plugins.description: Materials, BRDFs and shader node graphs: energy conservation, reciprocity, negative lobes, cycles, dead nodes, per-pixel cost.

plugins.name: pcbsight
plugins.description: PCB layouts (.kicad_pcb): open nets, clearance violations, trace current capacity, differential pair skew, impedance.
